svg.title: False-color soil nitrogen and SOC map – Maryland commercial farm pilot
svg.desc: A pseudo-drone hyperspectral false-color map showing spatial distribution of soil nitrogen (N) and soil organic carbon (SOC) across a 240-acre farm field, derived from SWIR band composites at 1478 nm (N) and 1650–1700 nm (SOC).
svg.text: Maryland farm pilot — false-color N + SOC map
Composite: N @ 1478 nm · SOC @ 1650–1700 nm · drone HSI 400–2500 nm
Source: Icarus drone HSI · Maryland pilot 2024 · anonymized coordinates
